2026-06-16T08:44:00.1554347Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1554541Z [36;1m# Write gdb command file.[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1554823Z [36;1m# Uses Python event hooks so that:[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1555226Z [36;1m#   - on a fatal signal  → prints full backtrace and exits gdb with code 1[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1555702Z [36;1m#   - on a clean exit    → exits gdb with the inferior's own exit code[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1556185Z [36;1m# (Plain 'quit' in gdb --batch always exits 0, even after SIGSEGV with nopass.)[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1556618Z [36;1mGDB_CMD_FILE=$(mktemp /tmp/gdb_cmds.XXXXXX)[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1556943Z [36;1mcat > "$GDB_CMD_FILE" << 'GDBEOF'[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1557227Z [36;1mset pagination off[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1557470Z [36;1mset confirm off[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1557710Z [36;1mset print thread-events off[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1557974Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1558177Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1558394Z [36;1m_crash_signal = [None][0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1558642Z [36;1m_inf_exit_code = [0][0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1558890Z [36;1mdef _stop_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1559216Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'stop_signal') and event.stop_signal:[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1559576Z [36;1m        _crash_signal[0] = event.stop_signal[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1559879Z [36;1mdef _exit_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1560222Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'exit_code') and event.exit_code is not None:[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1560601Z [36;1m        _inf_exit_code[0] = event.exit_code[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1560927Z [36;1mgdb.events.stop.connect(_stop_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1561262Z [36;1mgdb.events.exited.connect(_exit_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1561552Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1561873Z [36;1mhandle SIGSEGV stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1562172Z [36;1mhandle SIGABRT stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1562453Z [36;1mhandle SIGBUS  stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1562714Z [36;1mrun[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1562909Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1563112Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1563334Z [36;1msig = _crash_signal[0][0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1563575Z [36;1mif sig:[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1563835Z [36;1m    print("\n\n========== GDB CRASH REPORT ==========")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1564337Z [36;1m    print("Signal caught: " + str(sig))[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1564686Z [36;1m    print("--- Crashed thread backtrace (full) ---")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1565017Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1565318Z [36;1m    print("\n--- All threads backtrace ---")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1565646Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("thread apply all bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1565973Z [36;1m    print("=======================================")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1566279Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit 1")[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1566627Z [36;1melse:[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1566843Z [36;1m    code = _inf_exit_code[0] or 0[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1567129Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit %d" % code)[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1567395Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T08:44:00.1567598Z [36;1mGDBEOF[0m
